title: Sultans of Swing
album: 悲しきサルタン (REMASTERED VERSION) [REMASTERED VERSION]
why_this_song: Sultans of Swing by Dire Straits (1978) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sultans" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sultans" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "south" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "south" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: A band is blowing Dixie, double-four time
He's got a daytime job, he's doing alright
It ain't what they call rock and roll

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Yeah, the Sultans, they played creole

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Dire Straits one question about "Sultans of Swing", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Dire Straits sobre "Sultans of Swing", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Sultans of Swing" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Sultans of Swing" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Sultans of Swing" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Sultans of Swing" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
